message:
fix: UpdateIssueID now handles wisps (wisp_* tables)

UpdateIssueID only updated the issues table and its auxiliary tables
(events, labels, dependencies, etc.) but missed the parallel wisp tables
(wisps, wisp_events, wisp_labels, wisp_dependencies, wisp_comments).
When renaming a wisp, its auxiliary data was orphaned under the old ID.

Refactored into updateIssueID/updateWispID with isActiveWisp routing.
Added tests for both wisp and regular issue rename paths.

Closes bd-8ykk

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
